roles.title: Engineering Manager, Agent Prompts & Evals
roles.location: San Francisco, CA | New York City, NY
roles.why_match: Directly maps to the candidate's Director of Quality Engineering background. The team owns eval frameworks, system prompt pipelines, and regression-detection systems for every Claude model launch — essentially the QE/quality-assurance platform for AI/ML systems. Leading this team requires engineering management experience and a quality/testing mindset applied to AI, which is the candidate's core competency and desired pivot.

roles.title: Engineering Manager, Vertical AI Products (Multiple Roles — Financial Services, Life Sciences, Healthcare)
roles.why_match: Candidate's financial-institution background is a direct match for the Financial Services vertical. Role involves building AI products 0→1 for specific regulated industries, requiring engineering leadership and domain expertise — well aligned with 21+ years of engineering leadership in a large financial institution and the candidate's AI transformation pivot.

roles.title: Engineering Manager, Platform Foundations
roles.why_match: Aligns with Director/VP AI Platform Engineering priority. The role leads foundational platform infrastructure (multi-cloud, CI/CD, LLM product infra) at scale, explicitly calling out experience in regulated environments and infrastructure serving AI/LLM products — directly matching the candidate's large-org platform leadership background and AI-adjacent pivot.

roles.title: Engineering Manager, Accelerator Platform
roles.why_match: Fits priority #5 (senior/leadership-track AI/ML infra EM role). The team owns hardware-platform bringup and normalization for Anthropic's inference fleet; the EM will build and scale the team, set technical direction, and own the compute strategy layer — a senior platform leadership role at the intersection of ML infrastructure.

roles.title: Engineering Manager, API Core
roles.why_match: Fits priority #4 (Director/VP Engineering with explicit AI/agent platform scope). API Core owns the hot path of the Claude API and the full request lifecycle for every inference call. Leading this team requires engineering management experience over a critical AI platform, which aligns with the candidate's large-scale platform leadership profile.

roles.title: Head of Applied AI Architecture, Beneficial Deployments
roles.location: New York City, NY (and global — SF, London, Bengaluru)
roles.why_match: Posted July 3 2026. Fits priority #3 (AI Transformation/Program Lead) and priority #5 (senior Solutions Architect leadership). The role leads a globally distributed team of Applied AI Architects, sets vision and operating model for AI deployment, and requires 10+ years in technical leadership roles — a strong match for the candidate's senior leadership profile and AI-adjacent pivot ambitions.
